comment: Hand-authored degradation-profile -> node-chain routing for Simple Mode Auto. Every node must be permissively licensed (RuleTable.validate). Thresholds calibrated against analyzer v2 fixtures: blur_score multi-scale Laplacian (< ~90 soft); noise_score flat-region MAD (> ~0.007 noisy); jpeg_blockiness (> ~0.10 blocky); defect_score (> ~0.01 scratches); is_grayscale triggers DDColor; low_light/blown_highlights route to exposure_correct. Gated companions (DarkIR, InstructIR, DiffBIR, SUPIR) are applied as service overlays when installed+acked — never listed here.

stages.reason: underexposed (low mean luma + dark fraction) — recover shadow detail before denoising or upscaling
overexposed / clipped highlights — recover remaining highlight detail (generative fill may overlay later)
visible JPEG block artifacts — remove compression artifacts first so later stages don't amplify them
visible noise in flat regions — blind real-world denoising at native resolution before any upscale
grayscale / near-mono image — colourize with DDColor before upscale
small image — SwinIR transformer super-resolution for the highest-quality 4x upscale
faces detected — fast face restoration baseline
soft/blurred faces — follow up with the quality face node
physical defects detected — build an inpainting mask for scratches/dust
